top_signals.title: Stocks Up as Trump Cites Rapid Pace in Iran Talks: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders sent stocks higher as oil pared its rally after President Donald Trump said US talks with Iran are continuing at a rapid pace, while adding that Israel and Hezbollah agreed not to attack each other.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Climbs as Traders Weigh Latest Trump Comments on Iran Talks
top_signals.summary: Oil rose as trader weighed the latest comments from US President Donald Trump for clues on how negotiations are proceeding with Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Illinois Passes $56 Billion Budget as Bears Deal Stalled
top_signals.summary: Illinois legislators early Monday morning passed a nearly $56 billion budget for the fiscal year starting July 1, aiming to ease higher health-care and housing costs while bracing for potential federal funding cuts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Russia's $16 Billion Nuclear Deal With Kazakhstan Lacks One Critical Detail
top_signals.summary: When can a deal involving Russia be considered as done? When it comes to Russia’s agreement to build Kazakhstan’s first nuclear power plant, it is hard to determine. Kazakh officials announced almost a year ago that Russia’s nuclear energy entity, Rosatom, would build Kazakhstan’s first nuclear plant on the shores of Lake Balkhash. Yet on May 28, Russian leader Vladimir Putin, on a state visit to the Central Asian country, signed an agreement covering the “basic principles and conditions of…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto funds suffer second-largest outflows of 2026 while XRP and HYPE attract inflows
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
